summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
summary.en: Change Summary: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面

  • 变更说明: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
  • 影响范围: 影响 客户端状态处理、hagipower 相关功能、角色与职业元数据。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

项目、仓库和工作区相关操作

  • 变更说明: 改进了项目、仓库和工作区相关操作，提升代码定位与切换效率。
  • 影响范围: 影响 project 相关功能、hagipower 相关功能、assets 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

会话、消息和运行状态相关体验

  • 变更说明: 增强了会话、消息和运行状态相关体验，让上下文查看与过程反馈更清晰。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、看板与项目视图。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

remove Tags property from DataAggregationDto相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了remove Tags property from DataAggregationDto相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 app 相关功能、hagipower 相关功能、assets 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

add missing JsonPropertyName attribute to ResultMessage相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了add missing JsonPropertyName attribute to ResultMessage相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 claude-helper 相关功能、hagipower 相关功能、assets 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

HagiPower / Hero features

  • Change Summary: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.
  • Impact: Affects client state handling, Hagipower, hero and role metadata.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Project

  • Change Summary: Improved project, repository, and workspace actions to make code access and switching more efficient.
  • Impact: Affects Project, kanban and project views, Hagipower.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing project entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Session

  • Change Summary: Enhanced session, message, and runtime visibility to make context and progress easier to follow.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, kanban and project views.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to remove Tags property from DataAggregationDto.
  • Impact: Affects App, Claude Helper.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: No additional migration step is expected; this version mainly improves the reliability of the existing flow.

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to add missing JsonPropertyName attribute to ResultMessage.
  • Impact: Affects Claude Helper, App.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: No additional migration step is expected; this version mainly improves the reliability of the existing flow.
